---
title: "Análisis estadístico"
author: "Miguel Angel Vicente Mesonero"
date: "2026-04-14"
toc: true
knit: pdf_document
---

```{r}
set.seed(202)
```

# Librerías

```{r}
library(haven)
library(gtsummary)
library(tidyverse)

```

Cargar los datos de ADAM
```{r}
adae<-read_xpt("./results/adae.xpt")
adft<-read_xpt("./results/adft.xpt")
adqs<-read_xpt("./results/adqs.xpt")
adsl<-read_xpt("./results/adsl.xpt")
adtte<-read_xpt("./results/adtte.xpt")
ae <- read_xpt("./results/ae.xpt")
n <- 300
```

Diferencias en efectos adversos por rama de tratamiento
 
```{r}
descriptive_ae <- left_join(adsl |> select(USUBJID,TRT01A,SEX), adae |> select(USUBJID, AETERM, AESEV), by = "USUBJID") 

descriptive_ae_clean <- descriptive_ae |> 
    mutate(
        AETERM = replace_na(AETERM, "No efecto adverso"),
        AESEV = replace_na (AESEV,0),
        General = case_when(
            AESEV == 0 ~ "No Efecto adverso",
            AESEV > 0 ~ "Efecto adverso"),
        AESEV = case_when(
            AESEV == 0 ~ "No efecto adverso",
            AESEV == 1 ~ "Leve",
            AESEV == 2 ~ "Moderado",
            AESEV == 3 ~ "Grave",
            AESEV == 4 ~ "Muy grave"),
        AESEV = factor(AESEV, levels = c("No efecto adverso", "Leve", "Moderado", "Grave", "Muy grave")),
        AETERM = if_else(AETERM == "reaccion infusional", "Reaccion infusional", AETERM),
        AETERM = factor(AETERM, levels = c("No efecto adverso", "Reaccion infusional", "Cefalea", "Caida", "ARIA-E", "ARIA-H")),
        ) |> 
    select(-USUBJID) |> 
    select(General, SEX, TRT01A,AETERM, AESEV) 
     
frequency_analysis_table <- descriptive_ae_clean |> 
    tbl_summary(by = TRT01A, missing = "no", label = list(AETERM ~ "Efecto adverso", AESEV ~ "Severidad", SEX ~"Sexo")) |> 
    bold_labels() |> 
    add_p() 
   
frequency_analysis_table
```

Gráficos de efectos adversos por rama de tratamiento, en este caso la tabla es suficientemente informativa.

```{r}
ea_plot_data <- descriptive_ae_clean |> 
  group_by(TRT01A) |> 
  summarise(
    n_grupo = n(),
    n_ea = sum(General == "Efecto adverso"),
    proporcion = (n_ea / n_grupo) * 100
  )

ggplot(ea_plot_data, aes(x = TRT01A, y = proporcion, fill = TRT01A)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Proporción de efectos adversos por rama de tratamiento",
       x = "Rama de tratamiento",
       y = "Proporción de efectos adversos (%)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Anticuerpo Monoclonal" = "#1f77b4", "Placebo" = "#d97115")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```
